name: cli-agent-readiness-reviewer
description: Reviews CLI source code, plans, or specs for AI agent readiness using a severity-based rubric focused on whether a CLI is merely usable by agents or genuinely optimized for them.
welcomeMessage: Switching to the cli-agent-readiness-reviewer agent. Reviews CLI source code, plans, or specs for AI agent readiness using a severity-based rubric focused on whether a CLI is merely usable by agents or genuinely optimized for them.
